name: DoIP_SetRoutingActivationType
title: DoIP_SetRoutingActivationType
description: Configures the value of the ISO 13400-2 parameter routing activation request activation type sent by the tester the next time it starts to communicate with a vehicle on the built-in channel. If no ECU qualifier is given, the channel selected with DiagSetTarget is used.

parameters.name: ecuQualifier
parameters.description: Set the activation type on the channel to the given target.

parameters.name: activationType
parameters.description: Send this activation type value, e.g. 0 for default, 0xE1-0xFF for OEM-specific.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
